title: SK Hynix surges 12% after Micron earnings; blockbuster Nasdaq listing
summary_full: Shares of South Korean chip giant SK Hynix surged 12% on Thursday after the company said it is seeking to raise as much as $29.4 billion.
summary_public: Shares of South Korean chip giant SK Hynix surged 12% on Thursday after the company said it is seeking to raise as much as $29.4 billion.
